name: No-Bake Salad Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 (10 oz) thin crust Italian bread shell
1 cup cubed cooked chicken or turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the spinach dip evenly over the bread shell, leaving at least a half-inch of space from the edge.
2. Top the dip with the remaining ingredients: chopped broccoli, cubed cooked chicken or turkey, and sliced green onions.
3. To serve, cut into wedges. Makes 8 servings.
